observe: The floor here isn't solid. It's tiles — pages — and not all of them are loaded under you at once.
fault: You just stepped onto a tile that isn't there. That's a page fault. Don't panic — it just means we go get it.
repair: Jump carefully. Watch which pages are actually loaded before you land.
escape: Don't page out mid-jump. I need you grounded when it matters.

observe: Paging maps logical pages to physical frames via a page table.
fault: A page fault occurred when accessing a non-resident page.
repair: Trace the page table to identify resident and non-resident pages.
escape: Confirm all required page accesses succeed.

hints: A page fault isn't a crash — it's a signal to load the page and continue.
